eyebrow: Publication hub • creator workflows • release intelligence
intro: AUXSAYS is a publication hub for creators who care about tools that hold up under real use. It covers free AI tools, production workflows, automation, LMS systems, and patch intelligence built from official notes and high-signal community reaction.
coverage_sub: Practical tool breakdowns, creator systems, production workflows, and release intelligence for software that matters.

cards.title: Free AI Tools
cards.summary: App-specific breakdowns of tools that are genuinely usable without bait-and-switch export traps.

cards.title: Content Workflows
cards.summary: Repeatable production chains for thumbnails, edits, repurposing, packaging, and publishing.

cards.title: Automation Productivity
cards.summary: Scripts, prompts, and utility chains that save time without becoming another maintenance burden.

cards.title: LMS Training Systems
cards.summary: Systems-minded guidance drawn from instructional design, production support, reporting, and workflow architecture.
